Comfortable Accommodations: Residence House Ruse in Ruse offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and free WiFi. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and soundproofing for a pleasant stay.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax on the terrace or enjoy the bar. Additional amenities include a hot tub, balcony, and outdoor seating area. The property provides free toiletries, a hairdryer, and a work desk.
Convenient Location: Located 9 km from Danube Bridge and 7 km from Ruse Port, the guest house is a 17-minute walk from Renaissance Park. Nearby attractions include Rock-Hewn Churches of Ivanovo (24 km) and Ruse Train Station (3.1 km).

Comfortable Accommodations: Arletti Hotel in Ruse offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Each room includes a tea and coffee maker, free toiletries, and a TV.
Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy a garden, free WiFi, and an outdoor seating area. Additional services include private check-in and check-out, a paid shuttle, and full-day security.
Dining Options: A continental breakfast is served daily, and a coffee shop provides refreshments. Special diet menus and room service cater to diverse needs.
